calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-23-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: L. Bura, CSR: Yvonne Lee.
Petitioner: Daniel Roosevelt Barry, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Fatima Marie Zuniga.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-27-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name and Gender.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: M. Vallejo, CSR: Karen Fransworth CSR# 5152

No proof of service was filed. The matter is taken off calendar.
Party was referred to Access Center to file an amended OSC get a new date and comply with the publication requirement.
